_meta.note: Canonical progress-as-code (fix-16). Auto-merged by docs/index.html over HTTP. 2026-07-09 full-audit + remediation (research/12): FIXED and re-closed glue-08 (accepted apt releaseinfo change -> ansible-pull converges ok=30 failed=0, pings green) and sbom-03 (cleared etckeeper ref-lock + stale index.lock -> commits clean, sweep 63/63). RETIRED sbom-01/02/04 (user decision): SBOM/Dependency-Track judged overkill for a home net + syft was OOM'ing the 8GB mini; sbom-nightly timers disabled on mini+rig and the `sbom` ansible role removed so convergence won't redeploy it (sbom-01/04 left in done as completed setup work, feature retired). fix-19 default-address-pools restored in daemon.json + docker role (converge had been stripping them). 137->139; sbom-02 not counted (retired). 2026-07-09 docs-debt audit: closed game-03 (heavy game servers on the rig) — AMP (MinecraftCross Java+Bedrock) + Palworld run 24/7 on the rig with public playit paths, protocol-ping verified; was reality-done/tracker-open. Audit also re-verified done-claims across dns/nas/ha/verify tracks against the live fleet: no other reality-vs-tracker mismatch found; reopen-suggestions empty. 2026-07-11 docs-debt audit follow-through (user decisions): Dependency-Track FULLY RETIRED — 3 NAS containers removed (compose down), Kuma 'NAS DepTrack' monitor + caddy vhost + homepage tile + nas.containers manifest entries all removed (SBOM feature was already retired 07-09). DELETED never-deployed/retired stack dirs: mini litellm (phantom fallback), tdarr, maintainerr, dependency-track; plus the retired sbom ansible role + scripts/inventory/sbom-nightly.*. frigate stack dir KEPT (genuine future plan, bannered NOT DEPLOYED). 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (#17, queue item 07, user-walked): CLOSED 5 tracker-drift items verified live-done (ha-05 Hue [14 light entities], ha-11 HA backups [queue 02], ha-16 HomeKit Bridge [HASS Bridge:21064 loaded], dns-04 DNS outage runbook+verify script, nas-00e NAS music mount at /mnt/nas/music) -> 141->146. RETIRED 7 (ha-03 HAOS-in-VM superseded by HA Green; ha-17 LiteLLM fallback superseded by accepted AI-SPOF; game-01 LinuxGSM superseded by AMP-on-rig; game-04 Tailscale-expose superseded by playit; nas-06 2nd off-site, nas-03 Tier-2 HDD, nas-30 beets — user chose retire). DEFERRED 4 (optional, no active plan): ha-08 ESPHome dongle, ha-13 mmWave presence, game-12 save-sync, game-14 launcher/RomM. KEEP as planned: docker-14, read-11, and all Bucket-D tracks (smart-home ha-04/06/07/09/10/12/14/15, security/DR sec-01/03/04 + glue-06/sbom-05 rebuild drill, analogue read-*, etc.). ai-01 KEPT and EXPANDED into its own initiative — a first-class local-AI build (OpenWebUI + opencode as best-in-class local coding tools, ops/skills agents across the home net); see the local-AI plan doc. 2026-07-14 full roadmap walk (user, task-by-task over all 66 remaining): CLOSED 10 already-done (handoff-05/06 B2 bucket+creds, seed-10 music e2e, read-01 Calibre, read-13 Obsidian Sync, ha-29 policy, read-04 KOReader-on-Kobo, read-11 iPod sync, game-06 in-home stream, game-07 remote-direct stream) -> 146->156. RETIRED dns-05 (fail-open: prefer bypass over blackhole). DEFERRED 14 (glue-06/sbom-05 rebuild drill; glue-01 UPS-no-budget; retro-07 handheld; ha-15 Frigate/Protect-enough; ha-20 locks; ha-24 ThinQ; ha-30 sensor-rollout ~$505-865; fut-01..06 2-5yr). KEPT 41 as active roadmap; scope notes: sec-03->only B2 Object Lock, ha-31->only what's ownable now, ha-32->SSH+git-config glue. All deferred hardware compiled into docs/hardware-shopping-list.md. 2026-07-14 research.md integration (user decisions): docker-14 CLOSED as delivered (static+dynamic+NAS-by-IP+auto-Tailscale Caddy hosting all live; Coolify PaaS half DROPPED — non-starter on the 8GB mini) -> 156->157. game-12 UN-DEFERRED (Ludusavi+Syncthing save-sync folds into the new tracked Syncthing-hub task). Hygiene done live: RomM pinned :latest->4.9.2 + functional health probe (romm-serving); stale maintainerr+deptrack Caddyfile vhosts removed. New research-derived tasks tracked in docs/research-integration.md (Vaultwarden data cutover, FOSS suite packaging, Syncthing hub, Ente Auth+YubiKey, RomM RetroAchievements dashboard, seed-11 public indexers, seed-12 Bitmagnet, seed-13 Whisparr). research.md corrected (Immich v2.7.5; RomM assets already backed up). 2026-07-14 game-13 CLOSED (GPU-contention policy): set OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=0 on the rig (was 30m) so each model unloads immediately after its request and VRAM frees between requests for the single 3090 Ti shared by Apollo stream / game servers / inference. Repo-first in local-ai-tooling scripts/01-ollama-tune.sh (separate repo, pushed 3c4df3c); applied live via the idempotent tune script (daemon-reload+restart); validated behaviorally (llama3.2:3b VRAM 724->~5095->724 MiB within 1s of request completion, running-process /proc environ confirms =0). New negative-tested regression check rig-ollama-keepalive (host: rig SSH, systemctl show, regex rejects 30m/0m/0s/-1) deployed to mini; rig tier 11/11 incl. rig-ai-e2e still green (cold-load 1.9s << 50s budget). 157->158. 2026-07-14 wiki-05 CLOSED (same-commit rule): added scripts/wiki/wiki-drift-check.sh (checks HEAD out into a throwaway git worktree, re-runs all 5 page generators, diffs; exit 1 = a source changed without regenerating its wiki page) + the wiki-drift verification check (checks.d/git-hygiene.yaml; keeps a forgejo cache clone fast-forwarded to HEAD on mini) + documented the rule + a source->generator map in README. Negative-tested (deliberate checks.d + script edits -> drift caught; it also caught a real pre-existing miss: the glue-02 commit had changed cachyos-desktop-baseline.sh without regenerating its man-page — fixed here). 157->158. 2026-07-14 seed-11 CLOSED (operator decision): the IPT-only TV/anime search gap is resolved with PRIVATE-tracker redundancy, NOT public indexers. Prowlarr fullSyncs 5 TV-capable private indexers (IPTorrents, OnlyEncodes+, RetroToon, SexTorrent, Zenith) to Sonarr with automatic-search enabled; indexerstatus shows no failing indexers; all 4 *arr apps at fullSync. Public piracy indexers (EZTV/TPB/Nyaa/SubsPlease) DECLINED. New regression check sonarr-indexer-redundancy (>=3 search-enabled indexers, reads stable enable-flag config not flappy availability). seed-12/seed-13 (Bitmagnet DHT crawler, Whisparr) similarly declined. 158->159. 2026-07-14 media-06 CLOSED (owner decision: ALAC on rig, FLAC on NAS, no dupes): RETIRED the verbatim rsync mirror (music-mirror.timer/.service, rsync -rt --delete-after) that copied FLAC to the rig and --delete-after wiped the 05:00 ALAC output; removed unit files + deleted 1772 leftover ~/Music/*.flac (78G->15G; NAS masters intact). nas-music-mirror.service (05:00 FLAC->ALAC transcode) is now the sole mirror + inherited the music-mirror-rig healthchecks dead-man (ExecStartPost). Guard: rig-music-no-flac check (flac count==0). wiki hosts/rig timer+unit docs + maintenance-calendar updated. wiki-06 CLOSED (build-out complete per owner). 160->162. 2026-07-14 sec-03 DONE (owner: pick best long-term + execute): restic->B2 backups now ransomware-immutable. Enabled B2 Object Lock GOVERNANCE 30d + lifecycle on bucket-restic; deployed a restricted no-delete 'restic-append-only' key (no deleteFiles/bypassGovernance) to rig+mini /etc/restic/env. restic deletes by HIDING (writeFiles) so backup+forget+prune still work; new objects verified Object-Locked +30d. Caveat: restic can't remove its own lock (401, cosmetic, exit 0) -> monthly master-key `restic unlock` from a trusted host. Also completed this session: #2 rig full -Syu (121 pkgs, kernel 7.1.3-2) + reboot -> GPU restored, 13/13 rig checks green, all containers + game paths back. hyper-backup bucket Object Lock NOT done (Synology rotation untested). 162->163. 2026-07-14 seed-13 BUILT (owner reversed the same-day decline: 'remove decline and build it'): Whisparr v2 adult-scene automation deployed on the NAS media-automation stack. Image ghcr.io/hotio/whisparr pinned by DIGEST (LSIO publishes no Whisparr; hotio 'latest' = v2 release channel, 2.2.0-release.108, github.com/hotio/whisparr/tree/v2). Root folder /data bound to a DEDICATED Stash sub-library /volume1/stash/root/whisparr (isolated from the ~557G hand-curated pile; Stash indexes new scenes on scan). Download client = remote Deluge on Betty 185.162.184.38:5945 + Remote Path Mapping /home/hd34/btabaska/files/ -> /seedbox/ (identical to the other *arrs). Registered as a Prowlarr Application (fullSync) so Prowlarr syncs ONLY adult-capable indexers (BitPorn, SexTorrent) by category match — PRIVATE-ONLY, no public sukebei/XXXClub (respects the seed-11 public-indexer decline). Caddy vhost whisparr.tabaska.us (LE via Cloudflare DNS-01). Monitoring to 100%: nas-whisparr functional /ping probe (checks.d/nas-services.yaml), whisparr added to coverage/nas.containers, 'NAS Whisparr' Uptime-Kuma monitor, homepage Private-group tile. Hygiene: removed the stale retired 'NAS DepTrack' line from bootstrap-nas-monitors.sh. Container start needed operator sudo (NAS SSH user has no docker socket). 163->164. 2026-07-15 nas-30 UN-RETIRED + re-scoped (user confirmed they use YouTube ingest): beets was retired 07-13 as 'redundant with Lidarr', but that only held for library-wide tagging (Lidarr writeAudioTags=sync + tags flow to the rig m4a via -map_metadata 0). beets' real, non-redundant job is tagging MeTube YouTube audio (bypasses Lidarr, junk tags). Fixed the beet-web crash-loop (added `web` plugin + web.host 0.0.0.0 -> :8337 serves) and added monitoring nas-beets (:8337) + nas-beets-ingest-fresh (import.log <30h). retired->done. 2026-07-15 ai-01 SHIPPED (local-AI buildout, max-effort handoff): model server migrated Ollama->llama-swap+llama.cpp (Docker CUDA via CDI, no daemon restart; ollama demoted to 3-model HA/Obsidian shim on :11434 — HA Assist verified post-trim). Bake-off on a real edit->test->fix tool loop: coder=qwen3.6-35b-a3b (3/3, 0 malformed calls, 73-126 t/s), coder-strong=qwen3.6-27b; qwen3.6 ollama blobs were ollama-FORK GGUFs (mainline-incompatible) -> re-pulled unsloth GGUFs; other blobs hardlink-served from /opt/llm/models (outside restic scope by design). GPU-yield: 182ms unload-all + Apollo global_prep_cmd hook + ttl idle-unload. Coding pillar: opencode from the Mac via llm.tabaska.us fixed a 3-part failing repo in 32s (10/10 tests); pi.dev configured as minimal-harness alternative. Ops pillar: fleet-mcp read-only MCP tools (:8765, systemd) + ollmcp HIL TUI + mcpo/OWUI bridge, Trusted-VLAN UFW; demo diagnosis root-caused a failed unit in 3.5s. RAG: OWUI homelab-wiki collection, embed alias (nomic prefixes), daily wiki-rag-sync.timer on mini + mini-wiki-rag-fresh check. Hardening: ai-01 checks block in rig.yaml (llama-swap, models, behavioral gpu-yield, fleet-mcp, mcpo-fleet-tools, ops-agent-e2e; negative-tested), ai-stack-watchdog now probes BOTH docker->host hops (11434+8765 — the UFW class bit again on 8765 and was fixed), llm-triage repointed :9292/qwen3.6-35b-a3b, LiteLLM per-client virtual keys (vault ai_stack.*). Reboot-survival demonstrated in the 4-7AM window (back unattended in 76s, first request auto-loads). Known pre-existing issue flagged (NOT ai-01): restic-snapshot-fresh-rig marker false-positive (backups green, marker stale). 165->166. 2026-07-15 ai-01 post-ship increment (operator-requested): measured the REAL ctx ceilings (35B-A3B: 21.1GiB@131k, 22.8GiB@262k NATIVE — hybrid-attn KV ~14KiB/tok; 27B dense: 21.5@98k, 24.0@163k edge) and PROMOTED coder-strong to the Qwen3.6-27B MTP build (self-speculative decode, n-max 2): bench 34.5->50.3 t/s, real agentic loop 27.5->47.4 t/s (bake-off refactor re-run green, 0 malformed calls); #23658 aligned-ctx bug absent on b9994. coder ctx 32k->131k, coder-strong 32k->98k; opencode/pi client limits bumped. Caveats live in llama-swap config (-np 1, no images through MTP, q8_0-KV soak note).
